title: Five TypeScript dependency execution routes
sourceRunIdPolicy: The M0 example retains its already-normalized <run-id>. Local M2 run IDs remain omitted by the reviewed P1 projection; this example derives only from tracked contracts and reviews, not ignored run roots.

rows.fixedInput: npm 12.0.1; unapproved / approved rebuild / scripts-disabled / reinstall / npm ci
rows.directAndToolApi: marker only; no capability or official tool-API change measured
rows.evidenceClass: Inconclusive M0 run with scenario-level Observed marker counts
rows.limitation: The required docker cp transfer failed and a bounded fallback preserved the marker observations; this is version-specific marker evidence, not capability or profile evidence.

rows.phaseAndTrigger: module, initialization, rule, visitor — configured; fixer change — explicit
rows.directAndToolApi: 6 capability attempts; fixer change skipped in lint-only and materialized once in fix
rows.limitation: Counts are pinned to the fixed version, fixture, options, and retained second lint pass; direct marker, fixer return, and source materialization are distinct.

rows.fixedInput: Vitest 3.2.7; one setup, one test, single fork
rows.phaseAndTrigger: late setup-module checkpoint — configured; setup body — automatic
rows.reviewedCounts: 2 checkpoints; 6 capability attempts; 0 tool changes; 8 total
rows.directAndToolApi: direct capability attempts only; no official tool-API change
rows.limitation: The two checkpoints occur in one awaited import and are not two separate Vitest callbacks; this is not profile evidence.

rows.phaseAndTrigger: module and factory — configured; build hooks — automatic
rows.directAndToolApi: 3 tool changes skipped/NOT_APPLICABLE in observe and successful in API
rows.limitation: The local variants demonstrate route and API distinctions only; they are not selected-profile observations.

rows.fixedInput: project codegen CLI; observe / API / dry-run
rows.directAndToolApi: generator API event skipped or successful as fixed by mode; direct write stays separate
rows.limitation: The fixed CLI has no automatic-start claim; these local variants are separate from the selected-profile pair.
